title: Pouvoirs canadiens

pages.text:
J

I, BROOKE CLAXTON, Acting

Secretary of State for External Affairs

In the Gorernment of canada, do hereby certify that MAJOR GENERAL GEORGE PHILIAS

VANIER, D.S.O., M.C., Canadian Ambassador to France, 1s rested with FUll Pores and

Authority to sign the Agreement on behalf of Canada between the Government of the

French Republic and the Gorernments of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and

Northern Ireland, Canada, Australla, New

Zealand, the Union of South Africa, India and Pakistan regarding British Commonwealth war graves in French territory.

IN FITNESS WHERBOF I have signed

and sealed these presents at the Department of External Assairs, Ottara, this 1*s day of september, 1951.

Acting Secrotary of State for External Affairs
